name: Disney+
cancelNotes: If you subscribed through an app store or partner, cancel there instead.

name: Amazon Prime Video
cancelNotes: Manage under Prime Video Account & Settings; add-ons bought via an app store must be cancelled there.

name: Max
cancelNotes: Cancel via Max.com > profile > Subscription > Manage Subscription; if billed through a store or provider, cancel there.

name: Paramount+
cancelNotes: Cancel on the account page if you subscribed on the web; otherwise cancel via your app store or provider.

name: YouTube Premium
cancelNotes: If you subscribed in the mobile app, cancel via your app store instead.

name: Crunchyroll
cancelNotes: Cancel here if you subscribed on crunchyroll.com; store or console subscriptions must be cancelled there.

name: ADN
cancelNotes: On the web, open your Abonnement space and turn off auto-renewal; mobile-app subscriptions are cancelled via the store.

name: Canal+
cancelNotes: In your espace client, go to Abonnement > Mes demarches > Resilier; committed plans require notice before the renewal date.

name: Ciné+ OCS
cancelNotes: Cine+ OCS is billed by Canal+; cancel in your Canal+ account under Mon compte, or via your partner operator if subscribed through one.

name: Molotov
cancelNotes: Disable the paid option under account settings if billed by Molotov; Apple/Google/Amazon billing must be cancelled on that platform.

name: Universal+
cancelNotes: Cancel in the Mi cuenta section of the web app if billed directly; through a TV/ISP provider, cancel with them.

name: MUBI
cancelNotes: Cancel in subscription settings if you subscribed on the web; store subscriptions are cancelled via the store.

name: Shudder
cancelNotes: Cancel under Membership Settings if billed by Shudder; via Roku/Amazon/app store, cancel there.

name: DAZN
cancelNotes: Cancel under My Account > Manage Subscription if billed by DAZN; third-party billing must be cancelled with that provider.

name: Ligue 1+
cancelNotes: If you subscribed on the web, cancel under the Subscription tab of your Ligue 1+ account; store subscriptions cancel via the store.

name: beIN Sports
cancelNotes: For beIN Sports Connect, cancel under Mes offres with the Me desabonner button (available in the 30 days before renewal).

name: RMC Sport
cancelNotes: For RMC Sport 100% Digital, cancel in your Espace Client under Mes offres actuelles > Resilier; Apple/SFR/RED billing cancels with them.

name: Twitch
cancelNotes: Twitch subscriptions are managed per channel; on mobile they are billed through your app store.

name: Hulu
cancelNotes: Cancel under Your Subscription in a browser; if billed by a third party, cancel with them.

name: Peacock
cancelNotes: Cancel under Plans & Payments if billed by Peacock; store or provider subscriptions cancel there.

name: Discovery+
cancelNotes: Cancel on the Manage Your Account page if billed by discovery+; store/provider subscriptions cancel there.

name: CuriosityStream
cancelNotes: Cancel under Plan and Payment > Manage Plan if billed directly; store subscriptions cancel via the store.

name: Nebula
cancelNotes: Cancel in account settings if you subscribed on nebula.tv; app-store subscriptions cancel via the store.

name: ChatGPT Plus
cancelNotes: Cancel under Settings > Billing if billed by OpenAI; if you subscribed in the mobile app, cancel via your app store.

name: Claude Pro
cancelNotes: Cancel under Settings > Billing if billed by Anthropic; if you subscribed in the mobile app, cancel via your app store.

name: Google AI Pro
cancelNotes: Google AI Pro is managed through Google One; cancel there. If you subscribed via an app store, cancel there instead.

name: Perplexity Pro
cancelNotes: Cancel under Settings > Manage Subscription if billed by Perplexity; app-store subscriptions cancel via the store.

name: Microsoft 365 Personnel
cancelNotes: Select Manage > Turn off recurring billing (or Cancel subscription); app-store purchases cancel via the store.

name: Microsoft 365 Famille
cancelNotes: Select Manage > Turn off recurring billing (or Cancel subscription); app-store purchases cancel via the store.

name: Notion Plus
cancelNotes: In the app go to Settings > Billing > Change plan and downgrade to Free; only workspace owners can do this.

name: Grammarly Pro
cancelNotes: Cancel under Account > Subscription if billed by Grammarly; app-store subscriptions cancel via the store.

name: Canva Pro
cancelNotes: Cancel under Billing & Plans if billed by Canva; app-store subscriptions cancel via the store.

name: Adobe Creative Cloud
cancelNotes: Select Manage plan > Cancel your plan; early cancellation of an annual plan may incur a fee.

name: Adobe Photographie
cancelNotes: Select Manage plan > Cancel your plan for the Photography plan; early cancellation of an annual plan may incur a fee.

name: GitHub Copilot
cancelNotes: Under Billing & licensing, use Manage subscription > Cancel subscription; org/enterprise-provided Copilot cannot be self-cancelled.

name: Google One
cancelNotes: Open Settings and choose Cancel membership; if you subscribed via Google Play or the App Store, cancel there instead.

name: Dropbox
cancelNotes: Click Manage account > Cancel plan to downgrade to Basic; mobile-store purchases cancel via the store.

name: Microsoft OneDrive
cancelNotes: Select Manage next to your Microsoft 365 subscription, then Cancel subscription.

name: pCloud
cancelNotes: In account settings, open My Subscription and click Cancel Subscription; App Store/PayPal subscriptions must be cancelled via that provider.

name: Proton Drive
cancelNotes: In Settings > Subscription, choose Cancel subscription; downgrades to Free at the end of the billing period. Cancel before the renewal date.

name: Box
cancelNotes: Cancel under Account Settings > Billing/Plan; some individual plans require emailing cancel@box.com to downgrade at end of term.

name: MEGA
cancelNotes: In Settings > Plan, click Cancel Subscription; App Store/Google Play/PayPal subscriptions must be cancelled via that provider.

name: Backblaze
cancelNotes: There is no single cancel button: for Personal Backup, sign in then delete the backup/license to stop billing; for B2, disable the product under My Settings.

name: Sync.com
cancelNotes: Open your current plan tile and choose Cancel Subscription; Sync has no free tier, so this closes the account at the end of the paid term.

name: kDrive
cancelNotes: In the Infomaniak Manager, use Manage renewals to disable automatic renewal; iOS/Android app purchases are managed in the store.

name: NordVPN
cancelNotes: In your Nord Account, open Billing > Subscriptions and cancel auto-renewal. Access stays active until the period ends.

name: ExpressVPN
cancelNotes: Sign in, go to My Subscription > Edit subscription settings and select Turn Off Automatic Renewal.

name: Surfshark
cancelNotes: Open Subscription > Payments and click Cancel auto-renewal.

name: Proton VPN
cancelNotes: In Settings > Subscription, choose Cancel subscription or Downgrade. Cancel before the renewal date.

name: CyberGhost
cancelNotes: Open your profile > Subscriptions and choose Cancel Subscription to turn off automatic billing.

name: Mullvad
cancelNotes: Mullvad is prepaid with no auto-renewal: simply stop adding time and access ends when your paid time expires.

name: Private Internet Access
cancelNotes: In the Client Control Panel, open Subscription Overview and choose Turn off Auto Renewal.

name: Windscribe
cancelNotes: Scroll to Billing, click Manage Subscription, then Cancel Subscription.

name: 1Password
cancelNotes: In Billing > Billing Settings, click Unsubscribe.

name: Bitwarden Premium
cancelNotes: In Settings > Subscription, click Cancel Subscription; paid features end at the next charge date.

name: Dashlane
cancelNotes: In My Account > Subscription, click Cancel subscription / Stop auto-renewal.

name: LastPass
cancelNotes: In Account Settings > My Account, click Cancel Auto-Renewal and confirm.

name: NordPass
cancelNotes: In your Nord Account, open Billing > Subscriptions and cancel NordPass auto-renewal.

name: Keeper
cancelNotes: In Account Settings > Subscriptions, choose Cancel Subscription; Keeper may require contacting support to disable auto-renew.

name: Proton Mail
cancelNotes: In Settings > Subscription, choose Cancel subscription or Downgrade. Cancel before the renewal date.

name: Proton Unlimited
cancelNotes: In Settings > Subscription, choose Cancel subscription or Downgrade. Cancel before the renewal date.

name: Norton 360
cancelNotes: In My Subscriptions, select Manage Renewal to turn off auto-renewal. Protection continues to the end of the paid term.

name: McAfee
cancelNotes: In Account > Auto-Renewal Settings, find the subscription and click Turn Off.

name: Bitdefender
cancelNotes: In My Subscriptions > My Products, click Stop automatic subscription renewal.

name: Kaspersky
cancelNotes: In the Subscriptions tab, choose Manage subscription > Cancel subscription to turn off auto-renewal.

name: Malwarebytes
cancelNotes: In the Subscriptions tab, choose Manage > Turn off auto-renewal.

name: Kobo Plus
cancelNotes: Manage under My Account > My Subscriptions on kobo.com (not manageable in the iOS app or on eReaders).

name: Audible
cancelNotes: Cancel under Account Details in a browser if billed by Audible; app-store subscriptions cancel via the store.

name: Amazon Prime
cancelNotes: In Prime Central choose End Membership; use amazon.com/gp/primecentral for the US.

name: Fnac+
cancelNotes: Manage under Mon adhesion / Abonnement; French tacit-renewal rules require cancelling at least 5 days before the anniversary.

name: Cdiscount à volonté
cancelNotes: In your espace client, open the CDAV section and choose Se desabonner.

name: Costco
cancelNotes: Sign in, then Account > Membership to turn off auto-renewal at least 72 hours before the renewal month.

name: Free Mobile
cancelNotes: In the Espace Abonne, request resiliation under Mon offre; sans engagement, effective within 10 days.

name: Sosh
cancelNotes: Resiliation is online only: Contrats et options > Gerer votre offre > Resilier votre offre, with 10-day notice.

name: RED by SFR
cancelNotes: Request resiliation in the Compte Client; sans engagement, 10-day notice.

name: B&You
cancelNotes: Request resiliation under Mon offre; a 5 EUR resiliation fee may apply even on no-commitment plans.

name: Uber One
cancelNotes: Open Uber One > Manage Membership > End Membership; app-store purchases must be cancelled in the store. Cancel at least 48h before renewal.

name: Deliveroo Plus
cancelNotes: Cancel under Account > Deliveroo Plus; if subscribed via Amazon or an app store, cancel there instead.

name: Patreon
cancelNotes: Cancel per creator under Settings > Memberships; iOS-app memberships may be billed via Apple and cancelled there.

name: LinkedIn Premium
cancelNotes: Choose Manage subscription > Cancel; iOS/Google Play purchases must be cancelled in the store. Cancel at least 1 day before renewal.

name: Duolingo
cancelNotes: In Settings > Super Duolingo, choose Cancel Subscription; App Store/Google Play purchases must be cancelled in the store.

name: Babbel
cancelNotes: Disable auto-renewal under Account Information.

name: Headspace
cancelNotes: Log in on a browser (not the app) and tap Cancel membership; App Store/Google Play subscriptions are cancelled in the store.

name: Calm
cancelNotes: For Calm.com purchases, use Settings > Manage Subscription > Cancel; mobile subscriptions are cancelled in the App Store or Google Play.

name: Strava
cancelNotes: For website subscriptions, use Settings > My Account > Cancel subscription; store subscriptions must be cancelled in the store.

name: Basic-Fit
cancelNotes: Cancel via your My Basic-Fit account; a 4-week notice period applies and the contract minimum term must be met. This is a resiliation, not account deletion.

name: Fitness Park
cancelNotes: Cancel in your Espace Adherent via Resilier mon abonnement (a supporting document may be requested); 4-week notice applies. This is a resiliation, not account deletion.

name: Tinder
cancelNotes: For tinder.com purchases, use Settings > Manage Payment Account > Cancel; in-app purchases must be cancelled in the App Store or Google Play.

name: Meetic
cancelNotes: Log in on a computer, then Parametres du compte > Gerer le compte > Gerer l'abonnement and cancel auto-renewal; app-store subscriptions are cancelled in the store.

name: Xbox Game Pass Ultimate
cancelNotes: Select Manage next to Game Pass, then Cancel subscription. If bought on console via a store, cancel there.

name: Xbox Game Pass Premium
cancelNotes: Select Manage next to Game Pass, then Cancel subscription.

name: PC Game Pass
cancelNotes: Select Manage next to Game Pass, then Cancel subscription.

name: PlayStation Plus Essential
cancelNotes: Sign in and turn off auto-renew under Subscription Management.

name: PlayStation Plus Extra
cancelNotes: Sign in and turn off auto-renew under Subscription Management.

name: PlayStation Plus Premium
cancelNotes: Sign in and turn off auto-renew under Subscription Management.

name: Nintendo Switch Online
cancelNotes: Open Nintendo Switch Online and turn off automatic renewal.

name: EA Play
cancelNotes: Cancel here if billed by EA directly; Steam/PlayStation/Xbox/Epic/Amazon subscriptions must be cancelled on that platform.

name: Ubisoft+ Premium
cancelNotes: Cancel here if billed by Ubisoft directly; console/store subscriptions must be cancelled on that platform.

name: GeForce NOW
cancelNotes: Cancellation is a downgrade to the Free tier under account management; Apple/Google Play plans are cancelled in the store.

name: Amazon Luna
cancelNotes: Manage Luna+ under Amazon Memberships & Subscriptions.

name: World of Warcraft
cancelNotes: Under Games & Subscriptions, cancel WoW recurring billing; the account and characters are preserved.

name: Roblox Premium
cancelNotes: In Settings > Subscriptions, choose Cancel Renewal; iOS/Android purchases must be cancelled in the store.

name: Discord Nitro
cancelNotes: Cancel here for web/desktop-purchased Nitro; iOS/Android purchases must be cancelled in the store.

name: Spotify
cancelNotes: Cancel under Your Plan > Change Plan; if billed through a third party or store, cancel there.

name: YouTube Music
cancelNotes: If you subscribed in the mobile app, cancel via your app store instead.

name: Amazon Music Unlimited
cancelNotes: Cancel in Amazon Music Settings if billed by Amazon; app-store subscriptions cancel via the store.

name: Deezer
cancelNotes: Cancel under Manage my subscription if billed by Deezer; Apple/partner billing must be cancelled with them.

name: Qobuz
cancelNotes: Cancel in your account dashboard if billed by Qobuz; store subscriptions cancel via the store.

name: Tidal
cancelNotes: Cancel under Subscription if billed by TIDAL; app-store subscriptions cancel via the store.

name: SoundCloud
cancelNotes: Cancel on the Subscriptions page in a browser if billed by SoundCloud; store subscriptions cancel via the store.

name: Pandora
cancelNotes: Cancel under Settings > Subscriptions if billed directly; store subscriptions cancel via the store.

name: Storytel
cancelNotes: Cancel under Subscription if you subscribed on the web; store subscriptions cancel via the store.

name: Nextory
cancelNotes: Cancel under Subscription & Payment on My Pages if billed by Nextory; store subscriptions cancel via the store.

name: Podimo
cancelNotes: Cancel under My Account > Subscription if billed by Podimo; store subscriptions cancel via the store.
